---
title: "Frost and Sullivan"
page-layout: article
---

# Frost and Sullivan

## Description

Market research platform covering technology, healthcare, transportation, defense, chemicals, electronics, communications, and other industries. Useful for industry analysis and market forecasting.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://member.frost.com/login)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
